2.LuaScript:
function onLoad()
	circle = {
		color             = {0, 0.8, 0.4}, --RGB color of the circle
		radius            = 1,           --radius of the circle around the object
		show              = false,       --should the circle be shown by default?
		steps             = 64,          --number of segments that make up the circle
		thickness         = 0.05,         --thickness of the circle line
		vertical_position = 0.1,           --vertical height of the circle relative to the object
	}
end

function onScriptingButtonDown(index, playerColor)
if Player[playerColor].getHoverObject() == self then
if index == 1 then
circle.radius = 1.5
print('1" circle')
toggleCircle() end
if index == 2 then
circle.radius = 2.5
print('2" circle')
toggleCircle() end
if index == 3 then
circle.radius = 3.5
print('3" circle')
toggleCircle() end
if index == 4 then
circle.radius = 6.5
print('6" circle')
toggleCircle() end
if index == 5 then
circle.radius = 8.5
print('8" circle')
toggleCircle() end
if index == 6 then
circle.radius = 12.5
print('12" circle')
toggleCircle() end
if index == 7 then
circle.radius = 18.5
print('18" circle')
toggleCircle() end
if index == 8 then
circle.radius = 24.5
print('24" circle')
toggleCircle() end
if index == 9 then
circle.radius = 30.5
print('30" circle')
toggleCircle() end
end
end

function toggleCircle()
	circle.show = not circle.show
	if circle.show then
		self.setVectorLines({
			{
				points    = getCircleVectorPoints(circle.radius, circle.steps, circle.vertical_position),
				color     = circle.color,
				thickness = circle.thickness,
				rotation  = {0,0,0},
			}
		})
	else
		self.setVectorLines({})
	end
end

function getCircleVectorPoints(radius, steps, y)
	local t = {}
	local d,s,c,r = 360/steps, math.sin, math.cos, math.rad
	for i = 0,steps do
		table.insert(t, {
			c(r(d*i))*radius,
			y,
			s(r(d*i))*radius
		})
	end
	return t
end

-- Circle Distance Tool (includes 0" as hidden option, starts hidden at 0")
-- Scripting 1 = increase size, 2 = decrease size, 3 = toggle on/off
-- Distances are inches measured FROM THE EDGE OF THE BASE

local circle = {
    color             = {0, 0.8, 0.4},
    radius            = 1,
    show              = true,
    steps             = 64,
    thickness         = 0.05,
    vertical_position = 0.1,
}

local distanceSteps = {0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 10, 12, 18, 24}
local currentIndex = 1
local baseOffset = 0

function onLoad()
    Wait.time(function()
        detectBaseSize()
        updateCircle()
    end, 2)
end

function detectBaseSize()
    local b = self.getBounds()
    if not b or not b.size then return end
    local bounds = b.size
    local diameter_in = math.max(bounds.x or 0, bounds.z or 0)
    baseOffset = diameter_in / 2
end

function onScriptingButtonDown(index, playerColor)
    if Player[playerColor].getHoverObject() ~= self then return end
    if index == 1 then increaseStep()
    elseif index == 2 then decreaseStep()
    elseif index == 3 then toggleCircle() end
end

function increaseStep()
    if currentIndex < #distanceSteps then currentIndex = currentIndex + 1 end
    updateCircle()
end

function decreaseStep()
    if currentIndex > 1 then currentIndex = currentIndex - 1 end
    updateCircle()
end

function toggleCircle()
    circle.show = not circle.show
    if circle.show then detectBaseSize(); updateCircle()
    else self.setVectorLines({}); print("Circle hidden") end
end

function updateCircle()
    local distance = distanceSteps[currentIndex] or distanceSteps[1]
    if distance == 0 then
        self.setVectorLines({})
        print("0 inch radius")
        return
    end
    circle.radius = distance + baseOffset
    if circle.show then
        self.setVectorLines({
            {
                points    = getCircleVectorPoints(circle.radius, circle.steps, circle.vertical_position),
                color     = circle.color,
                thickness = circle.thickness,
                rotation  = {0,0,0},
            }
        })
    end
    print(distance .. " inch radius")
end

function getCircleVectorPoints(radius, steps, y)
    local t = {}
    local d = 360 / steps
    for i = 0, steps do
        local ang = math.rad(d * i)
        table.insert(t, {math.cos(ang) * radius, y, math.sin(ang) * radius})
    end
    return t
end

    show              = true,
    steps             = 64,
    thickness         = 0.05,
    vertical_position = 0.1,
}

local distanceSteps = {0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 10, 12, 18, 24}
local currentIndex = 1
local baseOffset = 0

function onLoad()
    Wait.time(function()
        detectBaseSize()
        updateCircle()
    end, 2)
end

function detectBaseSize()
    local b = self.getBounds()
    if not b or not b.size then return end
    local bounds = b.size
    local diameter_in = math.max(bounds.x or 0, bounds.z or 0)
    baseOffset = diameter_in / 2
end

function onScriptingButtonDown(index, playerColor)
    if Player[playerColor].getHoverObject() ~= self then return end
    if index == 1 then increaseStep()
    elseif index == 2 then decreaseStep()
    elseif index == 3 then toggleCircle() end
end

function increaseStep()
    if currentIndex < #distanceSteps then currentIndex = currentIndex + 1 end
    updateCircle()
end

function decreaseStep()
    if currentIndex > 1 then currentIndex = currentIndex - 1 end
    updateCircle()
end

function toggleCircle()
    circle.show = not circle.show
    if circle.show then detectBaseSize(); updateCircle()
    else self.setVectorLines({}); print("Circle hidden") end
end

function updateCircle()
    local distance = distanceSteps[currentIndex] or distanceSteps[1]
    if distance == 0 then
        self.setVectorLines({})
        print("0 inch radius")
        return
    end
    circle.radius = distance + baseOffset
    if circle.show then
        self.setVectorLines({
            {
                points    = getCircleVectorPoints(circle.radius, circle.steps, circle.vertical_position),
                color     = circle.color,
                thickness = circle.thickness,
                rotation  = {0,0,0},
            }
        })
    end
    print(distance .. " inch radius")
end

function getCircleVectorPoints(radius, steps, y)
    local t = {}
    local d = 360 / steps
    for i = 0, steps do
        local ang = math.rad(d * i)
        table.insert(t, {math.cos(ang) * radius, y, math.sin(ang) * radius})
    end
    return t
end
